headline: Veeva Commercial Summit to Feature Biopharma's AI Successes and the Path to Agentic Commercial
summary: Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) will showcase the future of agentic commercial in biopharma at Veeva Commercial Summit, May 19-20 in Boston. Leaders from argenx, Bayer, Boehringer Ingelheim, Genentech, Gilead, GSK, Merck, Novo Nordisk, Takeda, Vertex, and more will share AI successes and explore new approaches to commercial engagement.

headline: Matrix connects two new renewable projects to Spanish grid
summary: The new solar farms boost Matrix’s Spanish portfolio, supporting grid reliability and long-term clean power supply.

headline: Precigen: Full Commercial Validation And Room To Run
summary: Precigen's PAPZIMEOS wins early FDA approval with rapid insurer/physician uptake, a strong growth outlook, and improving EPS. Click to read more on PGEN stock.
